stem: Complete the description of the three basic logic gates.
review_notes: Free-typed cloze. Accept gate names in any case; 1/true and 0/false interchangeable.

parts.label: (a)
parts.prompt: Type the missing gate name or value into each gap.

part_config.text: An {{g1}} gate outputs 1 only when both inputs are 1. An {{g2}} gate outputs 1 when at least one input is 1. A {{g3}} gate inverts a single input. So when its input is 0 a NOT gate outputs {{g4}}, and when its input is 1 it outputs {{g5}}.
